name: Algieba
description: Smooth voice. Gemini 2.5 Flash TTS with natural language style control. Supports prompt-directed tone, accent, pace, and multi-speaker conversations.
licenseNotes: Gemini API usage governed by Google AI Terms of Service.

metadata.searchDescription: Algieba Smooth Gemini TTS Google AI voice style control multilingual smooth narration

knownLimitations: Preview — API may change before GA
Text-only input, audio-only output (no multimodal mixing in TTS mode)
No SSML — uses natural language prompts for style control instead
Multi-speaker limited to 2 speakers per request
Rate limited: 10 requests/minute on free tier
modelCard.notes: Voice style: "Smooth". Supports natural language style direction — prefix text with instructions like "Say cheerfully:" or "In a whisper:". Multi-speaker mode supports up to 2 voices per conversation. Also available on gemini-2.5-pro-preview-tts for higher quality. 70+ languages supported. Style, accent, pace, and tone controllable via prompt engineering.
modelCard.hardwareRequirements: Cloud API — no local hardware required
modelCard.architecture: Gemini multimodal transformer with TTS output head
modelCard.dataRetention: Subject to Google AI data usage policy

samples.transcript: The melody drifted through the hallway, smooth and unhurried, like a river winding through a valley.
samples.label: Default
